title: Aehr Test Systems Q3 2024 Earnings Call
text: Aehr Test Systems reported Q3 2024 earnings with significant challenges. Reported EPS was -$0.03, missing expectations of -$0.02625. Q3 Revenue reached $7.6 million, down 56% year-over-year from $17.2 million. Wafer pack revenue was $4.8 million, representing 63% of total revenue. Gross margin declined to 41.7% from 51.6% year-over-year. The company experienced delays in customer orders, particularly for silicon carbide systems used in electric vehicles. Management noted: In just the last two weeks of the quarter, we saw delays in orders for silicon carbide systems. Despite near-term challenges, Q3 2024 bookings totaled $24.5 million. The company maintained a healthy backlog of $20 million projected to be recognized as revenue in Q4 2024. Cash and equivalents reached $47.6 million with zero debt. The CEO emphasized growth opportunities across multiple semiconductor markets including silicon carbide, gallium nitride, silicon photonics, and memory devices. The company announced a new silicon carbide customer order and shipped its first silicon photonics system during the quarter. Full-year FY2024 guidance was reaffirmed with projected revenues greater than $65 million and net income of at least $11 million.
